title: Thich Nhat Hanh
blurb: Founder of the Plum Village tradition; brought mindfulness to millions.
lead: A Vietnamese Zen master who taught mindfulness as a way of living peacefully and compassionately in everyday life.

blocks.text: Thich Nhat Hanh was a globally beloved Zen teacher, author, and peace activist who founded the Plum Village tradition of engaged Buddhism.
He made mindfulness gentle and accessible — teaching that peace is available in ordinary moments like breathing, walking, and washing dishes.
Explore the free talks and guided practices from the Plum Village community, and his short, gentle writings on mindful living.

resources.title: Plum Village app
resources.whyHere: Free app with guided meditations and talks in his tradition.
